column13: My employer ensures that my contributions in the company are appreciated and recognized.
column14: I am highly valued by my supervisors; all my outputs are given high regard and appreciation.
column15: I am regularly rewarded when I meet work targets and deadlines on time.
column16: I am confident that my inputs in the organization are as much appreciated as that of my colleagues, and this is what is encouraging me to keep delivering my best.
column17: My employer is open and respectful of my ideas and guarantees that my inputs are meaningful to the improvement of the organization.
column18: My supervisor is always accessible when I need assistance regarding work or performance.
column19: I am heard when I communicate my concerns and suggestions, and they consider my contributions.
column20: I am motivated to deal with challenging work to improve my organizational skills and be open to various opportunities at work.
column21: I am encouraged to perform at my best when confronted with challenges in the workplace.
column22: I am encouraged to join a professional development opportunity to expand my potential and organizational skills.
column23: I am provided with the adequate tools and resources to do my job effectively.
column24: I feel my workload is reasonable and manageable because of the assurance of quality working conditions.
column25: My workplace ensures that I work in a healthy environment that is free from toxicity and unnecessary distractions.
column26: I am encouraged to be independent and exercise autonomy in relation to my work tasks without much supervision.
column27: I enjoy working in a systematic and highly organized environment where I can work with ease and ensure goal attainment.
column28: I experience fair treatment in my workplace regardless of my background or my nationality.
column29: I have experienced consistent enforcement of organizational policies on all employees.
column30: I attest that the promotion and reward systems given to all employees are transparent and free of bias.
column31: I witness how the organization promotes diversity and inclusion in the workplace all the time.
column32: I find that disputes are supposed to be resolved in a fair and impartial manner.
column33: I am happy about how meaningful my work is.
column34: I am capable of efficient application of my skills and knowledge in my work.
column35: I also achieve self-improvement and maturity at work.
column36: I am passionate and inspired in what I do.
column37: I feel accomplished and gratified with my work.
column38: I am satisfied with the compensation and benefits programs of the company.
column39: I feel secure at the job I hold.
column40: I am offered the chance of promotion and career development.
column41: I am satisfied that the demands of the work environment and time reflect my personal and professional requirements.
